author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Differences between init and config walkthrough: (1) init has an extra alias screen, (2) init has alias_selected/shell fields, (3) total_screens/confirm/go_back account for the alias screen. The new(), options_for_key, move_up, move_down, cycle_value, apply_preset_selections, build_config methods are byte-for-byte identical. Approach: create a WalkthroughCore struct with the shared logic, plus an optional alias_screen flag.
